headline: Paychex AI Rollout Sparks Questions On HCM Adoption And Valuation
summary: Paychex (NasdaqGS:PAYX) has rolled out new AI-driven capabilities across its Paycor and Paychex Flex human capital management platforms. The launch introduces AI tools for scheduling, timesheet approvals, auto shift creation, and smarter time off management to help streamline workforce operations. These product updates aim to support employers that are looking for greater efficiency and automation in day to day labor management. For investors watching human capital management providers,...

headline: Jim Cramer on Paychex: “A Good Company, and It Shouldn’t Be This Low”
summary: Paychex, Inc. (NASDAQ:PAYX) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer discussed. Answering a caller’s query about the stock during the lightning round, Cramer stated: The long knives are out for Paychex. I think that Paychex is doing well. I want to buy it at 17 with a 4.5% yield. I’m not sticking my neck out […]

headline: A Look At Paychex (PAYX) Valuation After Mixed Quarter And Peer Lag In Earnings
summary: Paychex (PAYX) has been under pressure after a mixed quarter, with revenue of US$1.56b in line with expectations but EBITDA slightly below consensus, marking the weakest peer comparison and a 16.1% stock decline. See our latest analysis for Paychex. Zooming out, Paychex’s 16.1% post earnings share price slide sits against a weaker backdrop, with a 90 day share price return of 12.21% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 33.64%. Meanwhile, shorter term 1 day and 7 day share price gains hint...
